title: Tunning of the variables (boil-up rate, heating power, reflux ratio, and separation efficiency) is exemplified for the classical non-ideal mixture of ethanol and water
author: Moure Abelenda, Alejandro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Preliminary work with the distillation collumn UOP3 of Armfield Ltd for the separation of the non-ideal mixture of ethanol and water. 
 Tunning of the variables (boild-up rate, heating power, reflux ratio) to enhance the separation efficiency. 
 Similar procedure should be applied for the direct isolation of ammonium bicarbonate for the tradiational batch distillation setup.
steps_raw:
Preliminary work with the distillation collumn UOP3 of Armfield Ltd for the separation of the non-ideal mixture of ethanol and water. 
 Tunning of the variables (boild-up rate, heating power, reflux ratio) to enhance the separation efficiency. 
 Similar procedure should be applied for the direct isolation of ammonium bicarbonate for the tradiational batch distillation setup.
